summary: Iteration 63: Post-Refactor Testing Complete. Massive modular monolith refactoring validated - server.py went from 17,828 to 255 lines with 492 routes across 30 domain files. All critical backend APIs working. P1 UI removals verified (War Room, Go-Live Health, Directory, Pricing, Vision). Fixed missing import in admin_giving.py.

minor.issue: Missing import for get_tenant_giving_metrics - FIXED by adding import from core.helpers

p1_ui_removals_verified.landing_page_vision_section: REMOVED (CORRECT) - 'The future of your church' CTA remains, which is different from Vision section

critical_code_review_comments: Modular monolith refactoring successful - all 492 routes working across 30 domain files
Fixed missing import: get_tenant_giving_metrics was not imported in admin_giving.py
All P1 UI removals correctly implemented
Rate limiting active (5 attempts per IP per 60 seconds)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 validated the massive modular monolith refactoring (server.py 17,828→255 lines) and P1 UI removals. Key findings: (1) All 492 routes working across 30 domain files in /app/backend/routes/, (2) Fixed missing import in admin_giving.py for get_tenant_giving_metrics, (3) All P1 UI removals verified - War Room, Go-Live Health, Directory, Pricing, Vision all removed, (4) Rate limiting active - wait 65+ seconds between test batches. MOCKED: Twilio SMS (stubbed), Stripe (test keys).
